title: Stink Bug Control in Irvington, NJ | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional stink bug control services in Irvington, NJ. Eliminate invasive stink bugs from your home or business. Prices from $350-$550. Same-day service available.
intro: Irvington residents facing stink bug invasions can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for fast, effective elimination services. These invasive pests are particularly problematic in fall and spring, seeking shelter in homes and businesses throughout the area. Our targeted stink bug control treatments range from $350 to $550 and provide long-lasting protection for your Irvington property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Irvington and surrounding New Jersey communities with specialized stink bug solutions. Our technicians understand the unique challenges of stink bug infestations in Irvington's diverse housing stock and use proven, eco-friendly methods to eliminate these odorous pests without the mess.
localContext: Irvington's mix of historic homes along Springfield Avenue and residential neighborhoods near Irvington Park creates ideal conditions for stink bug infestations, especially during seasonal transitions. The town's proximity to wooded areas and parks means properties are particularly vulnerable to brown marmorated stink bugs seeking warm indoor spaces during cooler months.

faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Irvington, NJ?
faqs.answer: Irvington's location and mix of older homes with small entry points make it attractive to stink bugs seeking winter shelter. The brown marmorated stink bug, an invasive species, thrives in New Jersey and congregates on sun-facing walls before entering buildings through cracks, windows, and vents during fall.

faqs.question: What does your stink bug control service include for $350-$550?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, exterior perimeter treatment, sealing of common entry points, interior treatment if needed, and removal of existing stink bugs. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and whether preventive exclusion work is required.

faqs.question: When is the best time to treat for stink bugs in Irvington?
faqs.answer: The optimal time for stink bug treatment is late summer to early fall (August-September) before they seek indoor shelter, and again in early spring when they become active. Preventive treatments during these periods are most effective at keeping stink bugs out of your Irvington home.

faqs.question: Are your stink bug treatments safe for homes with children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We focus on targeted applications, exclusion techniques, and can provide eco-friendly options upon request. Most treatments allow for re-entry within 2-4 hours after application.
